name: VEECO INSTRUMENTS INC
business: We are a manufacturer of advanced semiconductor process equipment that solves an array of challenging materials engineering problems for our customers. Our comprehensive collection of ion beam, laser annealing, metal organic chemical vapor deposition (MOCVD), chemical vapor deposition (CVD), advanced packaging lithography, single wafer wet processing, molecular beam epitaxy (MBE), and atomic layer deposition (ALD) technologies play an integral role in the fabrication of key devices.
sellsTo: Compound Semiconductor market (power electronics, photonics, RF filters, solar)
Scientific & Other market (quantum computing, optical coatings, research)
IDMs, Foundries, OSAT, HDD manufacturers, photonics manufacturers, research centers, universities

exposures.sentence: Veeco's technologies are at the forefront of enabling new technical innovations in the manufacture of high-performance AI chips and High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM).

Orders received in the third and fourth quarter of 2025 for our ion beam and wet processing equipment from demand for cloud and AI Data Centers, will drive revenue growth in 2026, principally in the second half.
We are a manufacturer of advanced semiconductor process equipment

Such devices include leading advanced node application processors for AI chips, high-performance computing, mobile devices, high-speed data communications, and radio frequency (RF) filters and power amplifiers for fifth generation (5G) networks and mobile electronics, photonics devices for 3D sensing, advanced displays, and thin film magnetic heads for hard disk drives in data storage.

However, demand has been rapidly growing for applications in automotive driven by adoption of electric vehicles (EV), energy and industrial end-markets which require compound semiconductor devices such as those made from gallium nitride and silicon carbide to address higher voltages and higher power requirements.

Received multiple orders in the Compound Semiconductor market for our Propel 300mm GaN on Silicon and Lumina+ Arsenide Phosphide new platforms, supporting end markets for AI data centers and low earth orbit space grade solar cells; these are revenue growth opportunities for 2026, principally in the second half.

Scientific & Other refers to advanced materials and device research such as quantum computing, and a range of manufacturing applications including optical devices (lasers, mirrors, optical filters, and anti-reflective coatings).
Won multiple orders for advanced wet processing and lithography systems from leading foundries, supporting critical end markets through AI, automotive, aerospace, defense, and communications.
Data Storage refers to the Hard Disk Drives (HDD) market which provides significant value for mass storage and is an important part of large capacity storage applications such as Data Centers.

catalysts.event: Revenue growth from data storage orders for cloud and AI data centers
catalysts.sentence: Orders received in the third and fourth quarter of 2025 for our ion beam and wet processing equipment from demand for cloud and AI Data Centers, will drive revenue growth in 2026, principally in the second half.

catalysts.event: Revenue growth from Compound Semiconductor orders for Propel and Lumina+ platforms
catalysts.sentence: Received multiple orders in the Compound Semiconductor market for our Propel 300mm GaN on Silicon and Lumina+ Arsenide Phosphide new platforms, supporting end markets for AI data centers and low earth orbit space grade solar cells; these are revenue growth opportunities for 2026, principally in the second half.

catalysts.event: IBD300 evaluation extension at DRAM customers into 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have two Ion Beam Deposition (IBD300) systems under evaluation at leading DRAM memory customers, which we have extended the evaluation into 2026.

catalysts.event: Stockholder approval of merger with Axcelis Technologies
catalysts.sentence: On February 6, 2026, by the stockholders of each company, but is still pending certain regulatory approvals and other customary mutual closing conditions.

tamClaims.claim: Semiconductor industry sales estimated at $770 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Sales in the Semiconductor industry are estimated to have increased year-over-year in 2025 to approximately $770 billion dollars, according to Gartner.
